name: JellyShim
overview: Performance optimization plugin — smaller assets, compressed images, smarter caching.
description: JellyShim optimizes your Jellyfin web client: JS/CSS minification, Brotli/Gzip pre-compression, native image resizing (WebP/JPEG) with per-type settings, intelligent cache headers with ETag/304, HTML optimization (modulepreload, defer, preconnect), Link preload headers, CORS/CORP headers, and optional security headers. Zero external dependency — install, restart, done.

versions.changelog: Initial release: JS/CSS minification, Brotli/Gzip pre-compression, native ImageSharp image optimization with 13 per-type settings, smart cache headers, HTML optimization, Link preload headers, CORS/CORP, optional security headers, plugin asset support, File Transformation bridge.
